description: applyCreditToInvoice no longer decrements invoices.total_amount; credit_applied increment and existing transaction/allocation/pool writes unchanged.
computeBalanceDue derivation becomes total_amount − credit_applied − payments; slice-1 call sites unchanged, helper internals swapped.

Read-site audit: every amount-due consumer switched to computeBalanceDue — MSP invoice list/detail, client portal list/detail/pay, overdue detection, export selectors. Audited-site list recorded in SCRATCHPAD before backfill merges.
Stripe payment-link amount (getOrCreateInvoicePaymentLinkUrl) charges computeBalanceDue, not total_amount.
Invoice PDF and email templates rendering an amount due use the derived balance (with credit shown as its own line where templates support it).
Backfill migration: total_amount += credit_applied where credit_applied > 0; down migration reverses; transaction-safe.
Migration + model: invoices.invoice_type ('standard'|'credit_note'|'prepayment') backfilled from is_prepayment and negative totals; is_prepayment kept in sync.
Finalizing a negative-total invoice sets invoice_type 'credit_note' (existing credit_issuance_from_negative_invoice behavior unchanged).
Credit-note number sequence: CM- prefixed, configurable alongside invoice numbering settings; credit notes draw from it at creation/finalize.
Producer: finalizing a credit_note invoice with a connected realm + auto-sync on enqueues export_credit_memo.
Adapter CreditMemo transform: sign-flipped lines, same item/tax mappings and tax-delegation behavior as invoices; QboClientService gains CreditMemo create/update.
CreditMemo delivery writes mapping ledger rows (external_entity_type 'CreditMemo') with sync token + exported-total snapshot.
Validation: prepayment invoices are excluded from accounting export with a clear, translated message; credit notes validate like invoices (item/tax mappings).
Manual export batches can include credit notes through the existing selector (preview credit_memo flag honored); scheduled and manual paths share the pipeline.
Drift detection covers mapped CreditMemos (total change, void/delete in QBO) using the slice-1 comparator and exception flow.
Producer: applyCreditToInvoice enqueues apply_credit keyed to the credit_allocations row when a realm is connected.
apply_credit op processes only when both credit note and target invoice are mapped; otherwise remains pending with a reason and drains after exports complete.
apply_credit execution creates a zero-dollar QBO Payment linking CreditMemo→Invoice for the applied amount; allocation-keyed mapping row provides idempotency/echo suppression.
voidInvoice action: reason required, permission-gated; status → 'cancelled'; writes invoice_cancelled transaction; auto-reverses credit applications (pools + client balance + reversal transactions).
voidInvoice guards: blocked while payments exist; credit notes voidable only when unapplied (applied → must unwind first); drafts excluded (delete remains for drafts).
Invoice detail UI: Void action with confirmation dialog + reason field; voided invoices render the cancelled state.
hardDeleteInvoice blocked when an external accounting mapping exists; error message directs to void.
Outbound void_invoice op: adapter voids the linked QBO Invoice/CreditMemo (QBO void operation); mapping status → 'voided'; slice-1 badge renders it.
Producer: voidInvoice on an exported document enqueues void_invoice (auto-sync state does not gate voids — books must follow).
Alga-side credit unapply (if invoked on a synced allocation) files an exception rather than silently diverging (non-goal: auto-reversal in QBO).
i18n: credit-note labels, CM numbering settings, void dialog, validation and exception messages in en + translated locales; pseudo-locales regenerated.
